content:
# Dorea Pipeline Run — 2026-04-03

## Input
- File: `footage/raw/2025-11-01/DJI_20251101111428_0055_D.MP4`
- Resolution: 3840×2160 @ 119.88fps
- Duration: 14.0s, 1671 frames

## Output
- File: `working/graded/DJI_20251101111428_0055_D_graded_20260403.mp4`

## Parameters (defaults)
- `--warmth 1.0`, `--strength 0.8`, `--contrast 1.0`
- `--proxy-size 518`, `--keyframe-interval 30`
- `--depth-skip-threshold 0.005`, `--depth-max-interval 12`
- Auto-calibrated from 20 keyframes (no pre-computed .dorea-cal)

## Model Paths
- RAUNE weights: `working/sea_thru_poc/models/RAUNE-Net/pretrained/RAUNENet/test/weights_95.pth`
- RAUNE models dir: `working/sea_thru_poc`
- Depth model: `models/depth_anything_v2_small`
- Inference device: CUDA (RTX 3060)

## Timing
- Wall time: **2m 17s** (2m16.927s)
- CPU time: 5m 48s (multi-threaded)
- Calibration phase: ~46s (CUDA inference subprocess, 20 keyframes)
- Grading phase: ~91s (1671 frames, ~18 frames/sec wall-clock)

## Notes
- First end-to-end run on a real DJI Action 4 D-Log M clip
- `dorea grade` auto-calibrate path works without pre-computed .dorea-cal
- CUDA grader initialized successfully (cudarc + PTX modules)
